checks.name: seam-boundary
checks.details: performRunLifecycle delegates only the post-reset control-plane guard plus scheduler planning cluster through runLifecycleGuardAndPlanning; privacy reset, task-manager registration, execute/error handling, and completion remain outside the helper.

checks.name: forwarding-and-order
checks.details: Focused regression coverage proves guard runs before scheduler planning and that both calls receive the existing lifecycle inputs unchanged.

checks.name: guard-failure-short-circuit
checks.details: Focused regression coverage proves scheduler planning is not invoked when control-plane guard rejects.
